description_long: This sculpture features an abstract, tent-like form with three prominent, stretched triangular panels converging at elevated points, each capped with a rounded knob. The panels are textured with a rough, almost netted surface, and the structure is supported by thin, elongated legs that anchor it to a rectangular base. The material appears to be a dark, weathered metal, possibly bronze, with areas of patina and lighter highlights suggesting exposure to the elements. The overall form evokes a sense of tension and dynamic movement, as if the panels are being pulled upward and outward. The base is flat and rectangular, with a slightly worn, earthy appearance. The negative space within and around the sculpture creates intriguing visual pathways and shadows.
description: An abstract, tent-like metal sculpture with three stretched, textured panels converging at elevated points, anchored to a rectangular base. The dark, weathered surface and dynamic form evoke tension and movement.
description_view_0: From this angle, two of the triangular panels are most visible, with their peaks and rounded knobs clearly defined, and the base appears rectangular and flat.
description_view_1: This view highlights the tallest peak and the dramatic upward stretch of the central panel, with the supporting legs more visible and the texture of the surface emphasized.
description_view_2: Seen from this side, the three converging points and the negative space between the panels are prominent, giving a sense of the sculpture's depth and openness.
description_view_3: This angle shows the underside of the main arch, with the texture and curvature of the panels most apparent, and the base extending outward.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture is shown on a plain base with no surrounding context.
